tasks.subject: cachemig-T1: build infra (Dockerfile common_utils + SERVICE_NAME)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make common_utils importable in the image-comparison-service image + set Redis client_name, ZERO behavior change.

**Files (RAG-HP-PUB):**
- Modify apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/Dockerfile (insert `COPY libs/common-utils /app/libs/common-utils` + `RUN pip install -e /app/libs/common-utils` after apt-get, before requirements copy)
- Modify docker-compose.yml (image-comparison-service.environment += SERVICE_NAME=image-comparison-service)

**Verify:** (remote/VM) docker build from repo root succeeds + import common_utils.redis.cache_service works. Local: visual diff.

**Commit:** both EN+FR. Branch features/poc. Do NOT push. Full code in plan T1.

```json:metadata

(remote/VM)","acceptanceCriteria":["common_utils COPY+pip install -e before requirements","SERVICE_NAME in compose","no python code changed"]}
```

tasks.subject: cachemig-T2: code migrate JobManager + main.py to cache_service
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace inline redis client with shared cache_service ; counter DECR via safe_decrement_key. Behavior byte-identical.

**Files (RAG-HP-PUB):**
- Modify apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/main.py (init_redis_pool/close_redis_pool startup/shutdown ; drop job_manager.connect_redis/close_redis)
- Modify apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/app/core/job_manager.py (remove import redis.asyncio + self.redis + connect_redis/close_redis ; add `from common_utils.redis import cache_service` ; every self.redis.<op> -> cache_service.redis_client.<op> keeping .json() ; INCR raw, finally DECR -> await cache_service.safe_decrement_key ; semaphore/local_active_jobs/keys/TTL unchanged)

**GOTCHA:** access cache_service.redis_client as module attribute at call time ; never `from ...cache_service import redis_client`.

**Verify:** python -m py_compile main.py app/core/job_manager.py (or grep no self.redis/import redis) ; (remote) docker build + smoke (/capacity + compare job -> Successfully connected to Redis, client_name in CLIENT LIST, counter >=0).

**Commit:** both EN+FR. Branch features/poc. Do NOT push. Full surgical edits in plan T2.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/main.py","apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/app/core/job_manager.py"],"verifyCommand":"python -m py_compile apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/main.py apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/app/core/job_manager.py","acceptanceCriteria":["init/close_redis_pool wired","no self.redis/import redis remain","ops via cache_service.redis_client (.json() preserved)","finally DECR via safe_decrement_key","keys/TTL/contract unchanged","redis_client accessed at call time","py_compile clean"]}
```
